{{Missing Info|specifics=<br>Card icons}}

<tabber>
|-|Parsia=
==Tier 1 (White)==
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="7" style="background-color:#9c9c9c;" |[[File:ParsianCarpet.png|75x75px]]
| rowspan="7" |Parsian Carpet
|3x3||Enhancement Injection:<br>Snail HP +140<br>Snail DEF +14
| rowspan="7" | B-Tads +60
|-
|2x1||Parsia INTEL +2000
|-
|3x1||8000 B-Tads
|-
|4x1||Novice Scroll x10
|-
|5x1||{{Gearlink|white|Exploration|Parsian Pike}}
|-
|6x1||{{Gearlink|white|Exploration|Parsian Kite Shield}}
|-
|7x1||Lottery Ticket x2
|-
| style="background-color:#9c9c9c;" | [[File:Turquoise.png|75x75px]]
| Turquoise||2x1||Travel Speedup x2h||600 B-Tads
|-
| style="background-color:#9c9c9c;" | [[File:CamelBell.png|75x75px]]
| Camel Bell||2x1||12k B-Tads||Parsia Intel +600
|-
| style="background-color:#9c9c9c;" | [[File:Saffron.png|75x75px]]
| Saffron||3x1||Lottery Ticket x2||Parsian Tea +4
|}

==Tier 2 (Green)==
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="7" style="background-color:#7de87f;" | [[File:ParsianCarpetGreen.png|75x75px]]
| rowspan="7" | Parsian Carpet
|3x3||Enhancement Injection:<br>Snail ATK +14<br>Snail RUSH +14
| rowspan="7" | B-tads +180
|-
|2x1||Parsia INTEL +3500
|-
|3x1||15k B-tads
|-
|4x1||Novice Scroll x10
|-
|5x1||{{Gearlink|green|Exploration|Bichaq}}
|-
|6x1||Gear Chest x100
|-
|7x1||Lottery Ticket x2
|-
| style="background-color:#7de87f;" | [[File:ParsianSpice.png|75x75px]]
|Parsian Spice||3x1||Glue x50|| Parsia INTEL +1000
|-
| style="background-color:#7de87f;" | [[File:ParsianMiniature.png|75x75px]]
|Parsian Miniature||4x1||Evolution Chest x100|| B-Tads +1000
|-
| style="background-color:#7de87f;" | [[File:ParsianCat.png|75x75px]]
|Parsian Cat||3x1||[[Tri-Lion Bronze Candlestick]] Frag x10|| Refine Speedup +15m
|}

==Tier 3 (Blue)==
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="7" style="background-color:#7de8e6;" | [[File:ParsianCarpetBlue.png|75x75px]]
| rowspan="7" | Parsian Carpet
|3x3||Enhancement Injection:<br>Snail HP +160<br>Snail DEF +16
| rowspan="7" | B-Tads +540
|-
|2x1||Parsia INTEL +6000
|-
|3x1||25k B-tads
|-
|4x1||Novice Scroll x20
|-
|5x1||{{Gearlink|blue|Exploration|War Spikes}}
|-
|6x1||Gear Chest x100
|-
|7x1||Lottery Ticket x3
|-
| style="background-color:#7de8e6;" | [[File:GateofAllNations.png|75x75px]]
|Gate of All Nations||3x1||Wish Coin x1||Clone Speedup +20m
|-
| style="background-color:#7de8e6;" | [[File:FortyColumnsPalace.png|75x75px]]
|Forty Columns Palace||3x1||400 W-Tads||Fungus Chest +6
|}

==Tier 4 (Purple)==
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="7" style="background-color:#f3b5e1;" | [[File:ParsianCarpetPurple.png|75x75px]]
| rowspan="7" | Parsian Carpet
|3x3||Enhancement Injection:<br>Snail ATK +18<br>Snail DEF +18
| rowspan="7" | B-Tads +1620
|-
|2x1||Parsia INTEL +8000
|-
|3x1||35k B-tads
|-
|4x1||Expert Scroll x20
|-
|5x1||{{Gearlink|purple|Exploration|Assassin's Gauntlet}}
|-
|6x1||Gear Chest x100
|-
|7x1||Lottery Ticket x3
|-
|style="background-color:#f3b5e1;" | [[File:BamCastle.png|75x75px]]
|Bam Castle||3x1||Offering Speedup +4h||Parsia Treasure Map +3
|-
| style="background-color:#f3b5e1;" | [[File:ApadanaPalace.png|75x75px]]
|Apadana Palace||3x1||Parsia Treasure Map x50||Purple Reagent +4
|}

==Tier 5 (Orange)==
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="7" style="background-color:#ffb066;" | [[File:ParsianCarpetOrange.png|75x75px]]
| rowspan="7" | Parsian Carpet
|3x3||Enhancement Injection:<br>Snail HP +200<br>Snail DEF +20
| rowspan="7" | B-Tads +4860 
|-
|2x1||Parsia INTEL +10k
|-
|3x1||50k B-tad
|-
|4x1||Master Scroll x40
|-
|5x1||Gear Chest x100
|-
|6x1||Engineering Parts x3
|-
|7x1||Lottery Ticket x3
|-
| rowspan="2" style="background-color:#ffb066;" | [[File:Ahura.png|75x75px]]
| rowspan="2" | Ahura
|3x1||Wish Coin x1
| rowspan="2" | W-tad +60
|}

|-|Sky City=

==Tier 1 (White)==
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="7" style="background-color:#9c9c9c;" |[[File:HamsterLoans.png|75x75px]]
| rowspan="7" |Hamster Loans
|3x3||Enhancement Injection:<br>Snail HP +140<br>Snail DEF +14
| rowspan="7" | B-Tads +60
|-
|2x1||Parsia INTEL +2000
|-
|3x1||8000 B-Tads
|-
|4x1||Novice Scroll x10
|-
|5x1||Mutantigen x2
|-
|6x1||Green Organ Slime x50
|-
|7x1||Lottery Ticket x2
|-
| style="background-color:#9c9c9c;" | [[File:ProphecyBird.png|75x75px]]
| Prophecy Bird||2x1||Travel Speedup x2h||600 B-Tads
|-
| style="background-color:#9c9c9c;" | [[File:ThreeApples.png|75x75px]]
| Three Apples||4x3||12k B-Tads||Parsia Intel +600
|-
| style="background-color:#9c9c9c;" | [[File:EbonyHorse.png|75x75px]]
| Ebony Horse||3x1||Lottery Ticket x2||Parsian Tea +4
|}

==Tier 2 (Green)==
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="7" style="background-color:#7de87f;" | [[File:HamsterLoansGreen.png|75x75px]]
| rowspan="7" | Hamster Loans
|3x3||Enhancement Injection:<br>Snail ATK +14<br>Snail RUSH +14
| rowspan="7" | B-tads +180
|-
|2x1||Parsia INTEL +3500
|-
|3x1||15k B-tads
|-
|4x1||Novice Scroll x10
|-
|5x1||[[Organs|<span style="color:#40da25;">Paul II's Tentacle</span>]] x10
|-
|6x1||Gear Chest x100
|-
|7x1||Lottery Ticket x2
|-
| style="background-color:#7de87f;" | [[File:DevilsBottle.png|75x75px]]
|Devil's Bottle||3x1||Glue x50|| Parsia INTEL +1000
|-
| style="background-color:#7de87f;" | [[File:MagicLamp.png|75x75px]]
|Magic Lamp||4x1||Green Organ Slime x100|| B-Tads +1000
|-
| style="background-color:#7de87f;" | [[File:FourColorFish.png|75x75px]]
|Four-Color Fish||3x1||[[Garden of Roses]] x10|| Refine Speedup +15m
|}

==Tier 3 (Blue)==
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="7" style="background-color:#7de8e6;" | [[File:HamsterLoansBlue.png|75x75px]]
| rowspan="7" | Hamster Loans
|3x3||Enhancement Injection:<br>Snail HP +160<br>Snail DEF +16
| rowspan="7" | B-Tads +540
|-
|2x1||Parsia INTEL +6000
|-
|3x1||25k B-tads
|-
|4x1||Novice Scroll x20
|-
|5x1||[[Organs|<span style="color:#22d3d0;">Lava Gallbladder</span>]] x10
|-
|6x1||Gear Chest x100
|-
|7x1||Lottery Ticket x3
|-
| style="background-color:#7de8e6;" | [[File:BrassCity.png|75x75px]]
|Brass City||3x1||Wish Coin x1||Clone Speedup +20m
|-
| style="background-color:#7de8e6;" | [[File:CastleOfLovepile.png|75x75px]]
|Castle of Lovepile||3x1||Blue Organ Slime x100||Fungus Chest +6
|}

==Tier 4 (Purple)==
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="7" style="background-color:#f3b5e1;" | [[File:HamsterLoansPurple.png|75x75px]]
| rowspan="7" | Hamster Loans
|3x3||Enhancement Injection:<br>Snail ATK +18<br>Snail DEF +18
| rowspan="7" | B-Tads +1620
|-
|2x1||Parsia INTEL +8000
|-
|3x1||35k B-tads
|-
|4x1||Expert Scroll x20
|-
|5x1||[[Organs|<span style="color:var(--purple-text)">Lucky Phalange</span>]] x20
|-
|6x1||Gear Chest x100
|-
|7x1||Lottery Ticket x3
|-
|style="background-color:#f3b5e1;" | [[File:InvisibleGarden.png|75x75px]]
|Invisible Garden||3x1||Offering Speedup +4h||Parsia Treasure Map +3
|-
| style="background-color:#f3b5e1;" | [[File:DevilsPalace.png|75x75px]]
|Devil's Palace||3x1||Parsia Treasure Map x50||Purple Reagent +4
|}

==Tier 5 (Orange)==
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="8" style="background-color:#ffb066;" | [[File:HamsterLoansOrange.png|75x75px]]
| rowspan="8" | Hamster Loans
|3x3||Enhancement Injection:<br>Snail HP +200<br>Snail DEF +20
| rowspan="8" | B-Tads +4860 
|-
|2x1||Parsia INTEL +10k
|-
|3x1||50k B-tad
|-
|4x1||Master Scroll x40
|-
|5x1||[[Organs|<span style="color:var(--orange-text)">Strength Crystal</span>]] x40
|-
|6x1||Parsia Arcana Fragment x1
|-
|6x1||Engineering Parts x3
|-
|7x1||Lottery Ticket x3
|-
| rowspan="2" style="background-color:#ffb066;" | [[File:FortyThievesTreasure.png|75x75px]]
| rowspan="2" | Forty Thieves' Treasure
|3x1||Wish Coin x1
| rowspan="2" | W-tad +60
|}

</tabber>

[[Category:Parsia]]
[[Category:Missing Info]]
